# kCGWindowOwnerName | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Core Graphics ](/documentation/coregraphics)

- [ kCGWindowOwnerName ](/documentation/coregraphics/kcgwindowownername)

-  kCGWindowOwnerName 

Global Variable# kCGWindowOwnerName

Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.5+

```
let kCGWindowOwnerName: CFString
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/coregraphics/kcgwindowownername#Discussion)

The key that identifies the name of the application that owns the window. The value for this key is a [`CFString`](/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFString) type.

## [See Also](/documentation/coregraphics/kcgwindowownername#see-also)

### [Constants](/documentation/coregraphics/kcgwindowownername#Constants)

[`class let colorSpace: CFString`](/documentation/coregraphics/cgdisplaystream/colorspace)This key specifies the color space of the output buffer. If this key is not included in the dictionary, the output buffer uses the same color space as the display. For more information, see the header file `IOKit/IOGraphicsTypes.h`.[`var kCGDisplayMode: String`](/documentation/coregraphics/kcgdisplaymode)Specifies a `CFNumber` integer value that represents the I/O Kit display mode number.[`var kCGDisplayModeIsInterlaced: String`](/documentation/coregraphics/kcgdisplaymodeisinterlaced)Specifies a CFBoolean value indicating that the I/O Kit interlace mode flag is set.[`var kCGDisplayModeIsSafeForHardware: String`](/documentation/coregraphics/kcgdisplaymodeissafeforhardware)Specifies a CFBoolean value indicating that the display mode doesn’t need a confirmation dialog to be set.Deprecated[`var kCGDisplayModeIsStretched: String`](/documentation/coregraphics/kcgdisplaymodeisstretched)Specifies a CFBoolean value indicating that the I/O Kit stretched mode flag is set.[`var kCGDisplayModeIsTelevisionOutput: String`](/documentation/coregraphics/kcgdisplaymodeistelevisionoutput)Specifies a CFBoolean value indicating that the I/O Kit television output mode flag is set.
